top_signals.title: Crypto firms face July 1 EU cutoff as MiCA grace period ends
top_signals.summary: The ESMA says crypto companies without MiCA authorization must stop serving EU clients from July 1, even if their licence applications remain under review.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: New cyber force would cost up to $11 billion to start, commission says
top_signals.summary: The military branch would take 12 to 18 months to get up and running and also include roughly 5,000 members of the National Guard and up to 6,000 civilians, according to the commission.
